name: GSI Creos Corporation
summary: GSI Creos Corporation provides textile, industrial, and nanotechnology products worldwide. It sells functional materials used in innerwear's, stockings, sweaters, etc.; deals in synthetic and natural fibers to manufacture printed and jacquard fabrics, as well as textiles used in ladies' and men's wear, outdoor sportswear, etc.; and designs, manufactures, and markets men's and ladies' wear, innerwear, legwear, outerwear, etc. under the Mashu Kashu brand. The company also imports and exports raw materials for specialty coatings, paint and coatings, and personal care products, as well as other products comprising packaging films, industrial films and functional films etc.; supplies cutting-edge semiconductor equipment and materials, and composite machinery and materials, etc.; designs, manufactures, and sells hobby materials under GSI Creos brand. In addition, it develops applications for nano carbons in a range of products in various fields, such as paints and coating materials, fuel cells, and composite materials. The company was formerly known as Gunze Sangyo, Inc. and changed its name to GSI Creos Corporation in 2001. GSI Creos Corporation was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
